nasb.text: Then Joab came into the house to the king and said, “Today you have covered with shame the faces of all your servants, who today have saved your life and the lives of your sons and daughters, the lives of your wives, and the lives of your concubines,

esv.text: Then Joab came into the house to the king and said, “You have today covered with shame the faces of all your servants, who have this day saved your life and the lives of your sons and your daughters and the lives of your wives and your concubines,

cnv.text: 約押進了屋子去見王，說：“你所有的臣僕今天救了你的性命，和你兒女妻妾的性命，你今天卻使他們滿面羞愧；

ccb.text: 约押就进到屋里，对王说：“你的仆人们救了你和你妻妾儿女的性命，你今天却使他们感到羞愧。
